description: Stores payment transactions linked to orders

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: References the order this payment belongs to

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Amount charged in this transaction in dollars

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: Payment method used (e.g. credit_card, paypal, bank_transfer)

columns.name: transaction_date
columns.description: Timestamp when this payment was processed (use transaction_date, NOT order_date)

columns.name: status
columns.description: Payment status (e.g. success, failed, pending, refunded)
